tasks.instruction: Uzupelnij kazdy z ponizszych dialogow (1.1-1.6), wybierajac odpowiedz A, B lub C.

items.stem:
X: Excuse me, could you tell me how to get to the cathedral?
Y: _________
options: A) Go straight on and turn left at the traffic lights.
B) Go straight on and turn at left at the traffic lights.
C) Go straight on and turn to the left at traffic lights.

items.stem:
X: I'm afraid our flight has been delayed by three hours.
Y: _________
options: A) That's annoying. I wish we had booked a direct flight.
B) That's annoying. I wish we booked a direct flight.
C) That's annoying. I wish we would book a direct flight.

items.stem:
X: Do you happen to know what time the last train leaves?
Y: _________
options: A) If I'm not mistaking, it departs at quarter to eleven.
B) If I'm not mistaken, it departs at a quarter to eleven.
C) If I'm not mistaken, it departs at quarter to eleven.

items.stem:
X: We've missed the connecting bus. What do we do now?
Y: _________
options: A) We might as well get a taxi. There isn't another bus until morning.
B) We might as well to get a taxi. There isn't another bus until morning.
C) We may as well getting a taxi. There isn't another bus until morning.

items.stem:
X: I'd like to check in. I have a reservation under the name Porter.
Y: _________
options: A) Certainly. Could I see your passport, please?
B) Certainly. May I see your passport, please?
C) Certainly. Shall I see your passport, please?

items.stem:
X: Is it worth visiting the old town?
Y: _________
options: A) Absolutely. It's well worth to see.
B) Absolutely. It's well worth a visit.
C) Absolutely. It's well worthy of a visit.
